candidates.why: Broader finance-cost line; acceptable fallback if specific interest expense is missing.

candidates.row_label: Interest Expense - Net of Capitalized Interest
candidates.why: Best direct match to interest expense.

candidates.why: Only a component of total interest expense, so lower priority fallback.

candidates.why: Supplemental component only, not preferred as the main interest line.

final_choice.row_label: Interest Expense - Net of Capitalized Interest

variables.notes: Priority list: prefer the specific interest expense line; use broader financial expenses only if the specific line is unavailable in a given year.
